description: Feature queue M.E.R.L.I.N. — S1 COMPLETE (15 archived). S2+S3 active. 10+ pending minimum.

sprints.S1: COMPLETE — Core loop jouable, bugs critiques fixes, LLM valide
sprints.S2: CONTENU & SYSTEMES — biomes, verbes, MOS, cleanup restant
sprints.S3: POLISH & ROBUSTESSE — edge cases, LLM robustesse, UX, pixel render
sprints.S4: INTEGRATION & EXPORT — web build, CI/CD, demo jouable

rules.auto_generate_when_below: If fewer than 10 pending tasks remain, read docs/DEV_PLAN_V2.5.md and docs/GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md to generate new tasks until 10+ pending.
rules.task_decomposition: Each task must be completable in 1 cycle (~15 min). Break large features into atomic tasks.
rules.priority_algorithm: P0=critical bugs, P1-P5=sprint current, P6-P10=sprint next, P11+=backlog

tasks.title: Corriger intervals biomes + conditions arcs (bible v2.4 s.3.6 + s.4.3)
tasks.description: S2-INTEGRATION audit: 7/8 biome intervals wrong vs bible s.4.3 + arc names/conditions/counts wrong for 7 biomes vs bible s.3.6.

tasks.title: Remove dead GAUGES from context_builder.gd (stale key + dead function)
tasks.description: context_builder.gd still emits stale 'gauges' key (line 37: run.get('gauges',{})) and has dead get_critical_gauges() function (lines 186-199). GAUGES system was removed. Remove the key from build_full_context return dict and delete get_critical_gauges(). Verify no callers via grep.

tasks.title: Supprimer 5 dead files (bestiole, souffle HUD, D20)
tasks.description: Delete dead system files. Verify no remaining imports/references via grep.

tasks.title: Fix reputation_changed signal: emit clamped delta not raw
tasks.description: Signal emits raw unclamped delta. At faction_rep=95 + delta=+20, emits +20 instead of +5. Fix: compute actual_delta = new_val - old_val.

tasks.title: Ambiance dynamique biome: variation saison + heure de journee
tasks.description: Director q-002: Add time_of_day to run state. Expose season+time to LLM context builder.

tasks.title: Typographie hybride: titre celtique + corps sans-serif
tasks.description: Director q-003: FONT_TITLE (celtique) + FONT_BODY (sans-serif) dans MerlinVisual.

tasks.title: Direction artistique N64/PS1: low-poly + pixelisation
tasks.description: Director q-004: pixel snap, affine texture mapping, low-fi fog, reduced viewport scale, dithering shadows.

tasks.title: Memoire narrative: RAG pour resume compresse story_log
tasks.description: Director q-001: RAG-based narrative memory. add_narrative_entry() per card, get_narrative_summary() for 3-5 items.

tasks.title: Configurer export web HTML5 automatise
tasks.description: Setup Godot HTML5 export. Verify SharedArrayBuffer headers. Output to web-export/.

tasks.title: Cycle jour / Nuit et saison
tasks.description: Mettre en place le cycle jour nuit en mode Playstation 1 avec volumétrie des objets et assets sur lesquels tu te base. Temps réel machine / serveur pour les saisons et cycle quotidien. Effets visuels avancés et cohérents
